title: Thelypteris saxicola
taxonomy: Thelypteris saxicola is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida and the division Pteridophyta. Thelypteris saxicola is further classified as the order Polypodiales and the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the marsh ferns or autumn ferns. The genus Thelypteris is a member of the family Thelypteridaceae, and it contains several species of ferns. Thelypteris saxicola's classification is also reflected in its scientific name, which is derived from the Greek words for "single" and "rock," likely referring to its solitary growth habit and rocky habitat.
